tweetText: OpenAI has updated the Agents SDK, adding native sandbox execution and a model-native harness for better security and performance. This helps developers create more robust and secure long-running agents. via OpenAI News

OpenAI has upgraded its Agents SDK to enhance the creation of safer and more capable AI agents for enterprises. This is important as it supports the increasing demand for advanced AI solutions. via TechCrunch AI

Hightouch hit $100M in annual recurring revenue, growing by $70M in just 20 months thanks to its new AI tools for marketers. This rapid growth highlights the increasing demand for AI solutions in marketing. via TechCrunch AI

LinkedIn reports a 20% drop in hiring since 2022, attributing it to rising interest rates, not AI. This highlights that economic factors are more influential on job markets than technology for now. via TechCrunch AI
Gizmo, an AI learning app, now has over 13 million users and just raised $22 million in funding. This growth highlights the increasing demand for innovative educational tools. via TechCrunch AI

A Thiel-backed startup called Objection plans to use AI to assess journalism, allowing users to pay to challenge stories. This could impact whistleblowers and change media accountability. via TechCrunch AI

Google has launched a native Gemini app for Mac, allowing users to share their screens and get real-time assistance with local files. This enhances productivity and makes it easier to get help when needed. via TechCrunch AI.

Emergent's new AI tool, Wingman, helps users automate tasks via chat on apps like WhatsApp and Telegram. This could change how people manage daily tasks, making life easier and more efficient. via TechCrunch AI

Allbirds is shifting away from its shoe business to focus on AI, rebranding as NewBird AI after securing $50M in funding. This pivot highlights the growing trend of companies embracing AI to adapt and innovate. via TechCrunch AI

Reid Hoffman suggests that monitoring AI token usage can help measure adoption, but warns it shouldn’t be seen as a straightforward indicator of productivity. This insight is crucial for understanding AI's real impact. via TechCrunch AI
